name: NotificationThread
description: JSON Structure description of the Gitea NotificationThread entity.

id.description: ID is the unique identifier for the notification thread

pinned.description: Pinned indicates if the notification is pinned

unread.description: Unread indicates if the notification has been read

updated_at.description: UpdatedAt is the time when the notification was last updated

url.description: URL is the API URL for this notification thread
